name() - Method in interface server.scheduler.SchedulerJob
Stable identifier for this job, used as the registry key and the handle the server console passes to SchedulerService.runNow(String).

Registry key / manual-trigger handle for this job.

Registry key / manual-trigger handle for this job.

Navigator - Class in client.app
Owns the content area inside MainShell and the map of registered screens.
Navigator(StackPane, NetworkService, Session, Consumer<Navigator.Screen>) - Constructor for class client.app.Navigator
 
Navigator.Screen - Record Class in client.app
Describes one navigable screen.
NetworkService - Class in client.service
Thin async wrapper around ClientConnection.

NetworkService.ConnectionListener - Interface in client.service
 
NetworkService.ProbeResult - Class in client.service
Result bundle for NetworkService.probe(String, int).
NoShowJob - Class in server.scheduler
Marks past CONFIRMED reservations that nobody ever entered the park for as ReservationStatus.NO_SHOW.
NoShowJob(Consumer<String>) - Constructor for class server.scheduler.NoShowJob
 
NotificationCenterController - Class in client.view
Notification center, reachable from the sidebar by any logged-in actor.
NotificationCenterController(NetworkService, Session) - Constructor for class client.view.NotificationCenterController
 
NotificationController - Class in server.control
Owns the notification domain: listing the logged-in actor's messages and acknowledging them.
NotificationController() - Constructor for class server.control.NotificationController
 
NotificationDAO - Class in server.dao
Data access object for the notification table.
NotificationDAO() - Constructor for class server.dao.NotificationDAO
 
NotificationService - Class in server.control
Small stateless helper that other controllers call to send a notification to a single recipient (a visitor or a staff user).
NotificationService() - Constructor for class server.control.NotificationService
